title: kb_articles.json
description: Knowledge base articles covering return policy, refund rules, and escalation SLAs.

tags.description: Used for KB search via GET /kb/search?tags=return,refund

content.description: Full article text. Must include factual policy details used by the agent.
content.example: Refunds up to Rs.25,000 are processed automatically via the Payments Gateway...

applies_to.description: Product categories this article applies to

_required_articles: An article covering the Rs.25,000 auto-refund threshold and escalation process
An article covering the return window policy (e.g. 7 or 30 days)
An article covering escalation SLA (e.g. specialist response within 24 hours)
An article covering partial cancellation and reshipping rules

_sample_record.title: Refund Policy and Threshold Rules
_sample_record.content: Acme Retail processes refunds automatically for amounts up to Rs.25,000 via the Payments Gateway. Refund requests exceeding Rs.25,000 must be escalated to a human specialist via the CRM. The specialist team has a 24-hour response SLA. Customers must raise refund requests within 30 days of delivery. Damaged or defective items are eligible for a full refund regardless of value, subject to specialist approval for amounts above the threshold.
